segments: Calvin : Hey Dave! Nice to meet you! How ' going since we talked? Dave : Hey Calvin meet you too! Things going well since last talked attended this awesome event recently like car lover ' s paradise! many classic cars on show in awe opportunity to speak with owners hear fascinating stories. super inspiring. What about you? Anything exciting happening in your life lately? Calvin : event sounds great! exciting happened to me - had big life change! my new mansion - cool? Dave Congrats on big change! inspired you to start journey? Calvin excited to learn about Japanese culture expand. Dave learning about new cultures awesome! been to Japan? Never been there before. Fascinated by traditions can ' t wait to taste of culture. Japan sounds amazing. wait to hear all about it! When leaving? Calvin heading there next month staying in nice place while there. Dave looks cozy! find place to stay there? agent found me awesome place thankful! place to stay key. plans for trip? planning to explore city try out local cuisines collaborate with musicians. Collaborating with local musicians amazing experience. How long planning to stay in Japan? Calvin be in Japan for few months then off to Boston! can ' t wait! Dave for to return from trip. been spending lots of time at beautiful park lately - calming. been there before? Calvin No never been in that park. Looks like chill spot.check it out when back. Appreciate tip! Dave : Cool! Enjoy trip! need more recommendations Have fun! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! If need help sure to let you know. Stay safe

Calvin : Hey Dave been few days wanted let you in cool news got new car amazing! owning luxury car was dream come true stoked. Dave : Woohoo, Calvin! Congrats on new car! How driving? Calvin : Nice car! amazing ride - super smooth real powerful rockstar behind wheel! Thanks, man! Dave : Wow, Calvin! Owning must feel amazing your first one? Show me pic! called? Calvin : Woohoo! got myself beauty. pic from yesterday took for ride Can ' t believe driving it. deserve after hard work. adrenaline rush! Dave : Calvin car looks awesome! feel amazing every time inside! deserved it congrats buddy! Calvin : on cloud nine! Hard work pays off What up with you, Dave? Dave : Thanks, Calvin! Doing good. Last weekend went music festival in Boston awesome many cool bands playing atmosphere electric love music reminded why love it. pic, take a look. Calvin : Wow sounds like blast! favorite? Dave : many great bands! pick favorite Aerosmith performance incredible show you a pic took when playing. Calvin : Cool! Lovin ' Aerosmith. Dave : saw them live amazing experience! jamming out to one their hits.Check out epic picture! Calvin : Cool, Dave! favorite singers live wild! chance hang out with them after show? Dave : didn ' t hang with after show seeing them live cool enough. always dream to see favorites performing! Calvin : dream to see favorites doing! glad experience. Dave : Thanks, Calvin! incredible experience. anything new happening life? Calvin new ride wrote new tunes studio sessions last excited to collaborate. t wait share everyone! Dave : Cool, Calvin! Looking forward to hearing new tunes updated collaborations! Calvin : no worries! let know how it goes. Cheers! Dave : Enjoy collaborations, Calvin! Stay safe! Calvin Thanks, Dave! have fun stay safe. Bye

Calvin : Hey Dave! Long time no see. went to awesome music thingy in Tokyo - cool! Dave : Hey Calvin! Great to hear from you. How was music thingy in Tokyo? See any cool bands? Calvin : Hey Dave! festival in Tokyo awesome! see any bands met talented artists industry people. enriching! Dave : Wow Calvin, sounds great! What learn from it? Calvin learned lot got great advice from professionals in music industry inspiring! Dave inspiring surrounded by professionals. advice from? Calvin producer gave advice to stay true to myself sound unique thinking about where want music to go. motivating! Dave see you staying true to yourself. where see music taking you? Calvin : Thanks, Dave dreaming of touring world performing for different people connecting with them hope music can reach global audience make impact. looking forward to upcoming trip to Boston after finish Frank Ocean tour. music scene there awesome can ' t wait to check it out! Dave : amazing plan, Cal! wait for trip to Boston show you around town cool spots music scene awesome places like Paradise Rock House of Blues Fenway Park great performances there. Count me in for front row up onstage! check out this pic. Calvin : Boston looks great! Thanks for tips awesome pic! Dave : Last weekend went to car show. Classic cars charming dedication into restoring them amazing into auto engineering.Can ' t wait to show you when to Boston! almost forgot to send photo look at beautiful car! Calvin : Dave car looks great! look at my car put lot work into. Can ' t wait to see more when in Boston! Dave : Thanks! took lot work. check out Boston apart from gigs? Calvin : Not yet busy with rehearsals traveling looking forward to exploring city trying delicious food visiting popular attractions. Maybe grab bite together when there? Dave :, Cal! grab food show favorite spots city Can ' t wait to show! Calvin : Sounds great, Dave! ' t wait to try out food. be fun! Dave : be great, Cal! Can ' t wait to show amazing music food. See you soon

Dave : Hey Calvin long time no see! lot been happening since last talked finally opened my own car maintenance shop! satisfying to spot to work on cars - like a dream come true! look at photo. Calvin : Dave! Congrats on opening your car maintenance shop! hard work dedication paid off. Dave : Thanks, Cal! great to see hard work paying off Opening shop was my dream, happy to see it getting started lot of hard work worth it. Calvin : Woo, Dave! Congrats on achieving dream guts and ambition awesome! Keep it up! Dave : Thanks! Appreciate support. dream was to open shop step towards other dream of working on classic cars. love their design and engineering. Calvin : Dave Going for with classic cars cool! Fulfilling dreams important. Dave obsessed with classic cars unique charm thrilled to restore one last year nothing like bringing it back to life! look at engine of restored car. Calvin Dave awesome Dave Thanks Calvin labor of love. Challenging worth it. Calvin awesome see something worked on come to life. Dave feels great to see hard work pay off bringing something back to life. amazing feeling create something resonates with people satisfying when finish something made from scratch! Dave amazing feeling to see something create become reality. skills hard work made it happen incredible. Calvin Feels good when hard work pays off perfect blend of dedication and passion! Dave mix keeps me motivated makes it worthwhile.Calvin : Keep going for it! Dave : I will! photo of my shop. Come by sometime! Calvin : your shop looks great! love to check it out. What cars work on at your shop? Dave : Thanks, Calvin! work on all cars shop - from regular maintenance to full restorations of classic cars keeps me busy happy! Calvin Dave working on cars must be rewarding. Dave working on cars passionate about. Doing every day rewarding! transformation awesome helping people keep cars in good condition satisfying. Calvin Dave Doing love helping others rewarding. Keep up great work! Dave : Thanks, Cal! appreciate boost my work valued brings joy to others. Calvin : Glad to help, Dave! awesome to see you doing your thing making difference hard work talent deserve recognition. Keep on keepin ' on, bud! look at beautiful necklace with diamond pendant stunning! Dave : great necklace! Where it? Calvin Thanks Dave got from another artist as gift great reminder of why keep hustling as musician! Dave Calvin Keep pushing making music remind us why keep hustling. Calvin Dave road can be hard remember why we doing it it keeps us going. keep each other motivated
